implementing_department: Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Rajasthan
description: A scheme to promote the welfare and education of the girl child through staged financial assistance.
benefits: Total assistance of ₹50,000 in six installments from birth to Class 12
eligibility: Birth in government or private medical institution
Parents must have undergone family planning after two children

steps: Submit required documents at Anganwadi Centre
Installments released at different education stages

additional_notes: Installments linked with immunization and school enrollment.
